summary: Created full SQL Server schema scripts synced with current codebase: SWP_Nhom3_App_full_schema.sql (26 tables, indexes, roles/categories seed) and SWP_Nhom3_App_drop_all.sql for wiping before recreate. Explained that app already connects to real SQL Server, not in-memory mock data.
current_status: User can create fresh DB by running drop script then full schema script in SSMS/sqlcmd. Backend app.seed.enabled=true will add demo users on first start if desired.
